title: Is Polenta Gluten Free? | BiteRight
description: Public gluten safety analysis for Polenta. See major risks, safer alternatives, and what to ask before ordering.
heading: Is Polenta gluten free?
intro: This public analysis report explains the biggest gluten risks in Polenta and how to order more safely.

verdict.summary: Polenta itself is made from corn and is naturally gluten-free; however, there is a risk of cross-contamination with gluten-containing grains during processing or preparation. It's important to ensure that polenta is prepared in a gluten-free environment to avoid any contamination.

disclaimer: This guidance is informational only. Always verify ingredients and preparation with the restaurant.

sections.title: Quick answer
sections.body: Polenta can vary by recipe, ingredients, and cross-contact controls in the kitchen.

sections.title: Common gluten risks
sections.body: Watch for hidden sources like soy sauce, malt flavoring, marinades, thickeners, and shared fryers.

sections.title: How BiteRight helps
sections.body: Scan menus and ingredient labels with BiteRight to get a localized gluten-risk breakdown in seconds.

risk: Added ingredients like sauces or seasonings that may contain gluten

waiter_script.preview: Can you confirm if the polenta is prepared in a gluten-free environment?

faq.question: Can BiteRight confirm if Polenta is gluten free?
faq.answer: BiteRight highlights likely gluten risks based on ingredients and preparation. Always confirm with the kitchen if you have coeliac disease.

faq.question: What should I ask a restaurant?
faq.answer: Ask about shared equipment, sauces, marinades, and whether the kitchen has a dedicated gluten-free prep area.
